{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = World Tree
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[World Tree]] is a tree made of blue-and-white crystal with [[diamond]] leaves that cleans the earth and sky.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c34">''Waybound'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[World Tree]] drops fruit that can feed cities.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c34" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
